steps.title: Identify what caused the damage
steps.content: The strongest signal is the phrase “despite the damage _________ Soviet censors.” The word “despite” indicates an obstacle or negative effect. The defining clue is that Soviet censors, as suppressors of literature, must be the ones who damaged the novel—not the other way around.

steps.title: Match the word to the meaning
steps.content: ”Wrought by” means “caused by,” establishing the censors as the source of damage to the work. The other three choices frame the relationship differently—none position the censors as the agent of harm. That matches choice D — D is correct.
